start.text: Ah, another soul washed ashore. You're lucky the tide didn't take ye to the grotto. That place swallows ships whole.

grotto_info.text: The tidal grotto, east along the rocks. Water fills it at high tide, but at low tide... I've seen light glinting inside. Gold, maybe. Or something worse. Many a fool has gone in. Few come back.

choices.text: I'll check it out at low tide.

shipwreck.text: The Mara's Folly. Merchant vessel out of Karstead. Hit the reef in a storm three months back. I salvaged what I could, but the hull's still out there. Strange sounds come from it at night.

shipwreck_sounds.text: Creaking and groaning, sure — every wreck does that. But this one... whispers. Like voices under the water. The fish won't go near it no more.

shipwreck_loot.text: Rope, sailcloth, a few crates of salt. But the captain's cabin was locked tight. Never could pry it open. If ye've got strong arms, ye might have better luck.
